CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, value INT);
SELECT id, bit_not(value) FROM test_table WHERE value > 0;
SELECT id, bit_not(value) FROM test_table WHERE value < 0 AND id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value = -3);
CREATE TABLE another_table (a INT, b INT);
SELECT a, bit_not(b) FROM another_table WHERE a IN (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id = 1);
SELECT t.id, bit_not(t.value) AS negated_value FROM test_table t JOIN another_table a ON t.id = a.a WHERE a.b < 25;
SELECT SUM(bit_not(value)) AS sum_negation FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table) AS subquery;
SELECT id, bit_not(value) FROM test_table WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT a FROM another_table);
